title: VPC & Networking Module
description: Create VPC with public/private subnets across 3 AZs. NAT Gateways for private outbound access.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Identity Layer
acceptance_criteria: VPC created; Subnets tagged for EKS; IGW/NAT configured
definition_of_done: Terraform apply successful; Network reachability verified

title: EKS Cluster & Node Groups
description: Define EKS Cluster control plane. Configure Managed Node Groups with Spot/On-Demand mix.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Identity Layer
acceptance_criteria: Cluster ACTIVE; Nodes joined; kubectl access configured

title: Terraform: Cognito User Pool Definition
description: Define User Pool resource with password policies (Argon2id settings), MFA (TOTP), and custom attributes.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Identity Layer
acceptance_criteria: User Pool created; Password policy set; MFA enabled
definition_of_done: Terraform plan/apply success; AWS Console verification

title: Terraform: App Clients & Triggers
description: Define App Clients for Web/API. Implement Pre-Token Generation lambda trigger for custom claims.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Identity Layer
acceptance_criteria: App Client created; Lambda trigger linked; OAuth flows set

title: RDS PostgreSQL with pgvector
description: Define RDS instance in Terraform. Enable pgvector extension.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Identity Layer
acceptance_criteria: RDS provisioned; pgvector enabled; SG allows EKS access

title: JWT Strategy Implementation
description: Implement Passport.js JWT strategy to validate Cognito tokens. Verify signature using JWKS.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Identity Layer
acceptance_criteria: Tokens validated against JWKS; Expired tokens rejected
definition_of_done: Unit tests passing with mock tokens

title: S3 Service & Upload Controller
description: Implement S3Service for multipart upload. Validate file types (PDF/DOCX) and size.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Identity Layer
acceptance_criteria: File type/size validation; S3 storage; DB record creation

title: SQS Consumer Setup & Text Extraction
description: Set up SQS consumer loop. Implement text extraction from PDF/DOCX.
acceptance_criteria: Consumer reads message; File downloaded; Text extracted

title: OpenAI Integration & Prompt Engineering
description: Implement OpenAI client. Design system prompts to extract JSON schema (skills, scope).
acceptance_criteria: Reliable JSON extraction; Error handling for limits

title: Stripe Webhook Controller & Verification
description: Implement NestJS controller for webhooks. Middleware to verify Stripe-Signature.

title: Login & MFA Challenge UI Implementation
description: Develop Login form and MFA entry screens using Radix UI primitives.
acceptance_criteria: Login captures credentials; MFA screen works; WCAG AA

title: Split View Layout & PDF Viewer
description: Create layout with resizable split panes. Integrate PDF viewer component.
sprint_goal: Deliver Human-in-the-Loop UI & Full System Integration
acceptance_criteria: Split pane resizable; PDF renders correctly

title: Data Extraction Form & State Management
description: Build form for editing extracted fields (skills, scope). Pre-populate from DB.
sprint_goal: Deliver Human-in-the-Loop UI & Full System Integration
acceptance_criteria: Form populated with AI data; Validation rules applied
